CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:MagnifierInputController.kt$MagnifierInputController$( private val geometry: MagnifierGeometry, private val pdfDrawingStateProvider: (pageIndex: Int) -> PdfDrawingState, private val toolMode: () -> ToolMode, private val penSettings: () -> PenSettings, private val markerSettings: () -> MarkerSettings, private val eraserSettings: () -> EraserSettings, private val eraserOverride: () -> Boolean, private val eraserPos: MutableState<EraserPosition?>, private val onGestureStart: (pageIndex: Int, snapshot: List<DrawingPath>) -> Unit, private val onStrokeFinished: (pageIndex: Int, path: DrawingPath) -> Unit, private val onEraseFinished: ( pageIndex: Int, before: List<DrawingPath>, after: List<DrawingPath>, ) -> Unit, /** Scope для таймера hold-to-snap; инжектируется из owner-composable'а. */ private val scope: CoroutineScope, /** * Provider физического аспект-рашио страницы (`pageWidthPx / pageHeightPx`). * Нужен shape-recognizer'у, чтобы метрики считались в физическом * пространстве, а не в нормализованных `[0..1]`. */ private val pageAspect: (pageIndex: Int) -> Float, )
LongParameterList:MultiPageDrawingController.kt$MultiPageDrawingController$( pageIndex: Int, state: PdfDrawingState, nx: Float, ny: Float, pressure: Float, tilt: Float, )

LongParameterList:MultiPageDrawingController.kt$MultiPageDrawingController$( private val drawingStates: SnapshotStateMap<Int, PdfDrawingState>, private val geometry: PageLayoutGeometry, private val toolMode: () -> ToolMode, private val penSettings: () -> PenSettings, private val markerSettings: () -> MarkerSettings, private val eraserSettings: () -> EraserSettings, private val eraserOverride: () -> Boolean, private val skipPage: (Int) -> Boolean, private val onGestureStart: (pageIndex: Int, snapshot: List<DrawingPath>) -> Unit, private val onStrokeFinished: (pageIndex: Int, path: DrawingPath) -> Unit, private val onEraseFinished: (pageIndex: Int, before: List<DrawingPath>, after: List<DrawingPath>) -> Unit, /** * Scope для таймера hold-to-snap (см. [HoldGestureTracker]). Инжектируется * из composable owner'а (`rememberCoroutineScope`), чтобы не дёргать * `Dispatchers.*` напрямую (KMP-friendly + проверяемо в тестах). */ private val scope: CoroutineScope, )
LongParameterList:MultiPageDrawingController.kt$MultiPageDrawingController$( viewportPos: Offset, newPageIndex: Int, nx: Float, ny: Float, pressure: Float, tilt: Float, )
ReturnCount:MagnifierInputController.kt$MagnifierInputController$fun onMove( panelLocal: Offset, panelSize: Size, pressure: Float, tilt: Float, )
ReturnCount:MultiPageDrawingController.kt$MultiPageDrawingController$fun onMove( viewportPos: Offset, pressure: Float, tilt: Float, )
ReturnCount:MultiPageDrawingController.kt$MultiPageDrawingController$private fun startDraw( pageIndex: Int, state: PdfDrawingState, nx: Float, ny: Float, pressure: Float, tilt: Float, )
